default.name: Default
default.description: The signature look of the library — deep zinc surfaces, emerald accents, soft shadows, and crisp 1px borders. Every component ships in this style today.

glass.name: Glass
glass.description: Translucent frosted surfaces with backdrop blur, luminous edges, and layered depth floating over colorful backdrops.

minimal.name: Minimal
minimal.description: Hairline borders, generous whitespace, and restrained typography. Nothing on screen but the essentials.

neobrutalism.name: Neobrutalism
neobrutalism.description: Thick outlines, blocky offset shadows, and unapologetic primary colors. Interfaces that refuse to be ignored.

neumorphism.name: Neumorphism
neumorphism.description: Monochrome panels that appear pressed into or raised out of the background using paired soft shadows.

gradient.name: Gradient
gradient.description: Bold multi-stop gradients, glowing accents, and saturated color that carries the entire interface.

retro.name: Retro
retro.description: Cream paper backgrounds, chunky outlines, hard offset shadows, and a warm sunset palette of orange, mustard, and brown.

terminal.name: Terminal
terminal.description: Pure black canvas, phosphor-green monospace type, blinking cursors, and bracketed labels — the interface as a console.

aurora.name: Aurora
aurora.description: Deep night surfaces lit by drifting teal, indigo, and violet glows, with glassy panels floating on top.

pixel.name: Pixel
pixel.description: Hard pixel edges, chunky monospace type, blocky shadows, and a vivid retro-game palette. No anti-aliasing allowed.

material.name: Material
material.description: Tonal surfaces, soft elevation shadows, pill-shaped buttons, and a confident accent — clean Material-style hierarchy.
